name: meganeko-codex-workflows
description: Portable Codex workflow, context hygiene, coding, frontend design, API, and Git skills.

interface.shortDescription: Shared Codex guidance for coding, frontend design, Git, API, workflow, and context hygiene tasks.
interface.longDescription: MeGaNeKo Codex Workflows bundles portable skills for engineering practice, production frontend design, API contracts, Git hygiene, context hygiene, and Codex operating workflow. Environment-specific skills such as Docker context rules stay local.
defaultPrompt: Research, design, implement, and verify this interface.
Use context hygiene guidance for long-running threads.
